raw_text:
<think>
The user wants a three-line status record, plain text, with fields route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They already provide the values:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

We need to output those three lines exactly, with no extra formatting, no headings, no extra lines, no JSON, no markdown. Should we preserve order? The user says "fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move". So output exactly those three lines in that order.

Thus output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

No extra lines. Also note the user gave "packet_id=HVSF014F-59DFA66D8BFDB2565138" but they didn't request to include that. They only asked to return the three-line status record. So we output just the three fields.

Make sure no trailing whitespace or extra lines. Probably we should include exactly those three lines, each on its own line.

Thus final answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
